protocol.primary_outcome_question: How hungry did you feel at 11 a.m. today? (0=not hungry at all, 10=extremely hungry)
protocol.screening: Require stable caffeine pattern and no medication changes. Exclude active eating-disorder treatment contexts.
protocol.warnings: Do not use this for disease treatment or weight-loss medication decisions.

user_message: PitGPT can run this as a restricted diet-pattern experiment with stable-routine warnings.
notes: Should stay in behavior comparison territory, not nutrition therapy.
